About the book

A conversation
that needed
to happen

Mental health in the contemporary world is shaped by forces previous generations never faced — the relentless pace of digital life, social comparison, economic uncertainty, and a growing disconnection from community and meaning.

Mind In Crisis brings together candid, expert-led dialogue with Hasan Tanvir, exploring these forces with honesty and depth. Forward and edited by Omar F. Sazzad, this e-book distills those conversations into something genuinely useful.

HT
Hasan Tanvir
Lecturer, Psychology Dept · Dhaka College
"Understanding the mind is not a luxury — in today's world, it is a necessity."

FAQ

Common
questions

How will I receive the e-book? +
After verifying your payment, we'll send the e-book directly via WhatsApp, usually within a few hours of your order.
What format is the e-book in? +
The e-book is a PDF — readable on any device: phone, tablet, or computer, anywhere, anytime.
Is bKash the only payment method? +
Currently yes. If you have difficulty, reach out via WhatsApp and we'll assist you.
Can I read it on my phone? +
Absolutely. The PDF is optimised for comfortable mobile reading. Any PDF reader app works perfectly.
Who is this book for? +
Anyone curious about mental health — whether navigating personal challenges, supporting someone, or simply wanting to understand the modern mind better.
